g.text: - Operator mode keeps panel content summary-first for day-to-day
- Debug mode keeps denser technical detail for diagnosis.
- Persistent panel state lives in the active panel and top status
- Notices are short action outcomes and failure signals.
- Open debug mode or detail modals when you need deeper context.
- Ctrl+P opens the action palette for lifecycle, publish, config,
- Enter reopens the highlighted sidebar panel.
- C moves focus from the sidebar into the active workspace.
- D toggles between operator and debug views.
- E opens the expanded stream for the active panel.
- The footer and action palette are intentionally limited to the
highest-value actions for the current context.
